title: Rename device - Rename, non English language
scenario: Renaming a device with non-English characters does not display correctly across Home screen, Device Settings, Find My Device, and Support screens
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the device name displayed above the device settings area.
3. In the device name input field, clear the existing name and enter a new name using non-English characters (e.g., Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Cyrillic, etc.).
4. Tap Save or confirm the new name.
5. Verify the new name with non-English characters is displayed correctly in the input field.
6. Navigate to the Home screen and verify the new name appears correctly above the device settings.
7. Go to App Settings → Find My Device and verify the new name is displayed correctly.
8. Go to App Settings → Support → Device and verify the new name is displayed correctly.
expected: The device name with non-English characters is displayed correctly in all locations: the input field, above device settings on the Home screen, in App Settings > Find My Device, and in App Settings > Support > Device.
